phases.name: Client project flow / connection gates
findings: Root cause: add_model_to_project + client_project_models INSERT RLS required client_agency_connections accepted — contradicted Discover-as-gate invariant.
Frontend had no extra connection gate; uiCopy + projectsSupabase doc referenced old assumption.
ensureClientAgencyChat / option_requests insert do not use client_agency_connections (already aligned).

phases.name: Model claim / post-claim visibility
notes: finalizePendingInviteOrClaim + claim_model_by_token paths unchanged (AuthContext not touched).
Option/calendar visibility uses option_request_visible_to_me and model RLS — no connection prerequisite found in scope.

phases.name: Calendar entry consistency
notes: Services: calendarSupabase.ts, optionRequestsSupabase (booking_event, updateCalendarEntryToJob) — no change required for this audit.

phases.name: Smart attention
notes: optionRequestAttention.ts + ClientWebApp / AgencyControllerView / ModelView — workflow-only layer; no access-control coupling found.

phases.name: Consumer sweep
notes: No client_agency_connections usage in ClientWebApp, optionRequests store, messenger first-contact flows beyond product copy.
Hydration: fetchHydratedClientProjectsForOrg unchanged; cover parity already documented in projectsSupabase.
